name: What is the step-by-step process for voice search optimization?
description: Research real questions, rewrite pages in natural language, add structured data, and fix mobile and local business signals.

mainEntity.name: What is the step-by-step process for voice search optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: The process usually starts with research into the questions people actually ask, then rewriting key pages in conversational language. After that, structured data, mobile improvements, and profile cleanup help search engines trust and surface the content.
acceptedAnswer.description: Research real questions, rewrite pages in natural language, add structured data, and fix mobile and local business signals.
